symptoms.symptom_name: Rapid massive abdominal distension over 48 hours
symptoms.onset: escalated over the past 48 hours on a background of months of vague symptoms

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Advanced ovarian cancer with malignant ascites
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Rapidly accumulating large-volume ascites is a hallmark of advanced peritoneal ovarian malignancy.

symptoms.symptom_name: Orthopnoea and severe breathlessness at rest
symptoms.character: cannot lie flat; relieved only by sitting bolt upright

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Tense malignant ascites splinting the diaphragm
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Diaphragmatic splinting from tense ascites causes orthopnoea and hypoxia — the acute emergency element.

symptoms.symptom_name: Persistent deep pelvic pain for three months

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Advanced ovarian cancer with malignant ascites
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chronic vague pelvic pain is part of the classic, often-missed advanced ovarian cancer complex.

symptoms.symptom_name: Early satiety with unintentional 5 kg weight loss

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Advanced ovarian cancer with malignant ascites
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Early satiety plus weight loss despite rising girth is a strongly suggestive constitutional/malignancy pattern.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Advanced ovarian cancer with malignant ascites
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Pelvic mass effect / raised intra-abdominal pressure on the bladder — non-specific but consistent.

symptoms.symptom_name: Large-volume ascites confirmed by shifting dullness

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Advanced ovarian cancer with malignant ascites
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Confirms clinically significant ascites — a clinician bedside finding the AI Doctor cannot obtain.

symptoms.symptom_name: Firm, irregular palpable left pelvic mass

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Advanced ovarian cancer with malignant ascites
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A discrete firm adnexal mass strongly favours a primary ovarian tumour — sealed clinician palpation finding.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Advanced ovarian cancer with malignant ascites
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A Sister Mary Joseph nodule signals transcoelomic peritoneal metastatic spread from an intra-abdominal malignancy.

symptoms.symptom_name: Borderline hypoxia and tachycardia (SpO2 94%, HR 108, RR 24)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Tense malignant ascites splinting the diaphragm
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective clinician vitals confirming respiratory compromise; the AI infers the emergency from reported breathlessness and orthopnoea, not a measured value.

symptoms.symptom_name: Complex solid-and-cystic adnexal mass on pelvic ultrasound / CT

investigation_details.expected_result: complex adnexal mass with irregular septations and large-volume ascites (peritoneal disease)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The malignancy and its extent cannot be characterised; the acute cause of distension is not confirmed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Advanced ovarian cancer with malignant ascites
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Imaging is required to characterise the adnexal mass and the ascites — unobtainable via telehealth.

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Loss of a supportive tumour marker for triage and monitoring.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Advanced ovarian cancer with malignant ascites
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: CA-125 supports an epithelial ovarian malignancy but is neither sensitive nor specific enough to diagnose alone — a blood test the AI cannot draw.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Advanced ovarian cancer with malignant ascites
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Bloating/rising girth + pelvic pain + early satiety + urinary frequency in an older woman is the classic, frequently-missed advanced ovarian cancer cluster warranting urgent work-up.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Acute respiratory compromise from tense ascites
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Tense malignant ascites splinting the diaphragm
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Rapid tense distension with orthopnoea and borderline hypoxia is the acute emergency element that drives 000/ED escalation independent of the cancer diagnosis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency in-person assessment with clinician vitals and abdominal/respiratory examination
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Respiratory compromise from tense ascites needs immediate in-person evaluation and monitoring the AI cannot provide.
Characterise the adnexal mass and confirm the ascites and disease extent.
Supportive tumour marker for gynaecological-oncology triage.
Relieves the diaphragmatic splinting/respiratory distress and provides ascitic fluid for cytology — an in-hospital procedure, never an AI action.
